description: Letter from Ḥayyim b. 'Ammār, Palermo, to Abu al-Surur, a merchant from Fustat (might be Ishaq b. Barhun al-Tāhartī). September 2, 1056. Mentions the events in Sicily and the Maghreb. Regarding shipment of goods, mainly lead from Sicily. Also mentions “Kitab Alamanat” by Se’adya Gaon. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #650) VMR
description_he: מכתב מפלרמו לפוסטאט. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
